Custom Clay Creations

All products are hand sculpted and hand painted. Finished products are secured with top coat glaze and corked at the bottom, ready for use!

Jewelry Dishes

Dishes perfect for rings, earrings, bracelets, etc.

Pool Table Dish

A hand-sculpted square dish painted as a miniature pool table — complete with cue, balls, and pockets. A one-of-a-kind conversation piece.

Pink Bubble Cactus Dish

A bubbly pink dish with a spotted teal cactus ring holder.

Swimming Pool Dish

A pool dish in sky blue glaze with sculpted steps and a tiny life ring float.

Lily Pond Dish

Stone border and personalized pet snake.

Happy Pear Dish

A neutral round dish with a tiny smiling pear figurine at the center.

Green Blossom Dish

A bright green round dish with delicate pink cherry blossoms.

Cactus Ring Holder

A speckled cobalt blue cactus in a sky blue dish, perfect for rings.

Freeform Cobalt Blue Dish

A wide, freeform dish in deep cobalt blue with soft cloud-like swirls. Generous in size — perfect for layering jewelry.

Polka Dot Divided Dish

A two-compartment organizer, perfect for storing pins, everyday items, and rings.

Freeform Ocean Blue Dish

An organic-shaped dish in vibrant ocean blue with wave-like texture pressed into the surface. Bold and tactile.

Pink Cactus Dish

A bubbly pink wavy-textured dish with teal polka dot cactus.

Pizza Dish

A round dish with 3D olives and basil.

Coasters

Coasters made in any shape, perfect for gifts if desired as a set!

Bear Face Dish

Bear face dish used as a coaster or desk piece.

Botanical Leaf Coasters

Set of square coasters with hand-painted green leaf sprigs on a natural white base. Fresh, earthy, and cork-backed.

Mixed Style Coaster Set

A set of five coasters each in a unique design — from bold swirls and palm tree sunsets to geometric and Moroccan-tile patterns.

Wavy Line Coaster Set

A pair of round coasters in warm mauve with flowing white wavy lines. Minimal and modern.

Abstract Botanical Set

Set of three round coasters featuring abstract color blocks in blue, orange, and purple with delicate black botanical sprigs.

Speckle Duo Coasters

Midnight black with gold and sky blue with white.

Mint Leaf Coaster

A round coaster in soft blush with mint green half-circles and a hand-painted green leaf stem at center.

Cherry Blossom Coasters

A pair of round pink coasters with hand-painted white cherry blossom branches.

Custom Pieces

Additional unique pieces that are also practical and make great gifts.

Napkin Holder

A hand-built clay napkin holder with intricate white floral scroll detailing on a warm taupe base. Functional and decorative.

Polaroid Photo Stands

Set of hand-sculpted clay photo stands, each painted in a unique style — striped, marbled, and wave-patterned. Perfect for displaying polaroids or small prints.

Custom Christmas Ornaments

Personalized clay ornaments hand-painted for gifting — a gingerbread man and a custom name bulb. A heartfelt holiday keepsake.

Order

I make custom pieces that make for great personal use, decor, or gifts. I'm happy to chat and work through ideas with you before you commit to anything. Each piece is handmade by me and painted!

Pricing Range

$7 – $40+ depending on what you want -- size, complexity, design, quantity.

Send me a message with what you're thinking, including any inspo and reference pics if you have any, and we'll go from there!

Email Me

Orders take 1–3 weeks to complete

FAQ

Is this food safe? Can I wash them?

The pieces are NOT meant to be eaten in or washed.

Do I have to request what's on the website?

You may request ideas outside of what is shown. Each piece is customized.

How much do the custom pieces cost?

Prices can range from ~$25–40 for jewelry dishes; ~$7–$10 for individual coasters; $15+ for anything else custom. Email me to get a quote!

What clay is used?

High quality air dry clay.

How long does it take to make?

Any piece takes a series of days to complete, from sculpting, smoothing, drying, painting, and glazing. Your piece(s) may take anywhere between 1–3 weeks.

How will I receive my order?

It will either be shipped to you, handed over, or dropped off. This is factored into the final price.
